title: Policy viability under scrutiny
desc: Analysts have expressed caution over the feasibility of Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul's "Five Pillars" policy roadmap, unveiled under the slogan "Promises Delivered," citing a lack of clearly differentiated initiatives, the absence of a "signature" policy, and the lack of an explicit commitment to constitutional amendments.

title: New rules to boost data centre power
desc: The Energy Regulatory Commission (ERC) has finished drafting requirements for investors in data centres and other electricity-intensive businesses, mandating bank guarantees or collateral to secure power purchases.

title: Tourism sector seeking clear policies
desc: Tourism operators have criticised the government for lacking clear policies to address the debt burden and improve the competitiveness of small and medium-sized operators.

title: U-Tapao plan eyes 3m travellers a year
desc: The launch of the U-Tapao Airport and Eastern Airport City (EECa) development plan aims to transform U-Tapao into a new aviation hub capable of handling three million passengers annually.

title: Drugs link to rising youth mental illness
desc: Methamphetamine, cannabis and kratom remain key drivers of drug abuse among youth, with mental health complaints linked to drug use rising to 77.44%, according to research released this week.

title: Eastern border crossings to stay shut for now: PM
desc: Border crossings in Trat and Chanthaburi will remain closed, with no diplomatic talks or timeline set for reopening, says Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul.

title: Huge turnout battles rash of wildfires
desc: Wildfires intensified across northern and western Thailand, with 2,165 hotspots detected, as officials and an army of 25,000 fire-fighters escalated aerial and ground operations to contain spreading blazes.

title: Fuel crisis upends state's fiscal plans
desc: The energy crisis may pose a challenge for the government in pursuing its fiscal plan, which aims to reduce the fiscal deficit to no more than 3% of GDP, increase revenue through a higher value-added tax (VAT), and keep public debt below 70% of GDP, according to the Finance Ministry.

title: New push to keep fares low
desc: The government has approved a 2.06 billion baht support package for the transport sector, aiming to cushion the impact of rising fuel prices, stabilise fares and ease pressure on household living costs.

title: Calls mount for energy pricing rejig
desc: A coalition of civic groups has called on Energy Minister Akanat Promphan to reform the energy pricing structure, enact laws to reclaim excess refinery profits, and liberalise rooftop solar installation for households.

title: Agency raises diesel price ceiling in cost formula
desc: The Comptroller General's Department has raised the diesel price ceiling used in calculating reference prices for public construction projects to no more than 69.99 baht per litre, in order to reflect the rising costs of government construction works resulting from the war in the Middle East.

title: Ministry mulls shelving fuel loan
desc: The Energy Ministry is weighing whether to abandon plans to borrow 150 billion baht to support the fast-depleting Oil Fuel Fund, following a breakthrough in negotiations with oil refineries to lower diesel prices.

title: K-Research foresees stagflation risk in H2
desc: Thailand is expected to enter a state of stagflation late in the second quarter and the beginning of the third quarter of this year as businesses begin material restocking while oil prices remain high amid ongoing conflicts in the Middle East, according to Kasikorn Research Centre (K-Research).

title: Fertiliser supply set to last until May
desc: The Commerce Minister says the current fertiliser supply is expected to last until May, and at present no producers have requested approval to increase prices.

title: Oman to deepen energy, defence ties
desc: Thailand and Oman have agreed to deepen cooperation in defence and energy following an official visit by Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Affairs Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow.

title: Norathip draws new fire on unrest
desc: Internal Security Operations Command (Isoc) Region 4 has accused insurgent groups in the deep South of distorting Islamic teachings to justify violence, as backlash intensifies against the Fourth Army Area commander over remarks about religious schools.

title: Songkran just the tonic amid Mideast ructions
desc: The Songkran festival has played a crucial role in supporting and reviving the economy during a period of energy-related uncertainty, with expectations rising for further stimulus measures to sustain momentum, an academic said.

title: Fresh digital plan to fortify Thailand
desc: The Ministry of Digital Economy and Society (DES) has overhauled its strategy, aiming to position itself as the nation's centralised digital connectivity hub to strengthen Thailand against global uncertainties, cyberthreats and natural disasters, while ensuring transparent welfare distribution.

title: Initiative aims to update farming data landscape
desc: The National Statistical Office (NSO), in collaboration with the Ministry of Agriculture and Cooperatives, has launched the One Data initiative to modernise and integrate Thailand's fragmented agricultural data landscape.

title: Gulf opts to maintain KBank shareholding at 10% cap
desc: Gulf Development Plc has no plans to increase its shareholding in Kasikornbank (KBank) beyond 10%, partly due to additional regulatory requirements.

title: Phantom Of Lawyer is a fun, spooky take on the legal eagle drama
desc: There is a belief that if a person dies without getting justice, they will not rest in peace. Korean fantasy drama Phantom Of Lawyer, on VIU and Netflix, tells the story of a rookie lawyer Shin Yi-rang (Yoo Yeon-seok).

title: Novelties redefined
desc: Among its precious collections, Audemars Piguet's reflection of its free-spiritedness of independence on style and mechanics is the most enriching element that continues to move forward in its 151st anniversary.

title: Nike takes a walk on the spicy side
desc: Arguably Thailand’s most celebrated season, Songkran just swept through — ushering in the Thai New Year with its signature water-soaked celebration. Tapping into that spirit, Nike drops a festive take on the Nike SB Dunk Low with the “Songkran” iteration.

title: New taste tinglers for your palate
desc: Bangkok is a city that never sleeps, at least in the food and beverage department. Blink and you’ll miss another new restaurant opening, a drink launch, or a new nightclub. Guru By Bangkok Post is making sure that even if you blink, you don’t miss out on the new taste tinglers that are worth mentioning, in Bangkok and beyond.

title: Justin Bieber’s Coachella set sends streams skyrocketing
desc: Following the success of Justin Bieber’s Coachella set this past weekend, the pop star’s streams have launched back onto the charts sending hits like “Beauty And A Beat”, which was released over a decade ago, to the top of Spotify’s Global chart again.

title: Beyond the ordinary
desc: Hong Kong is always a good escape from Bangkok. Though it may be another concrete jungle escape, there are plenty of sea views and greenery to feel like an escape.

title: Thai Gen Z travellers prefer short, frequent trips
desc: Thai Gen Z travellers are reshaping travel habits in 2026 by favouring short but frequent trips over traditional long holidays, with mental well-being and value for money emerging as top priorities, according to the online booking platform Agoda.

title: New movies out this week: April 16-22
desc: Seven new releases that hit cinemas in Thailand this week.

title: New releases for your streaming pleasure: April 15-21
desc: Looking for a title to binge-watch this weekend? Here's our pick!

title: Japan's Alpine route opens, showcasing snow walls
desc: A sightseeing route that runs through the Tateyama mountain range in central Japan fully opened Wednesday for this year's tourist season, featuring tall snow walls.

title: 囤油等涨价？泰国警方突袭多府油库，多家公司被查
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月16日，泰国司法部联合多部门召开发布会，披露警方调查发现：部分油库涉嫌人为控油、延迟出货，只为等涨价。全国已查获多起非法囤油、走私及违规售油案件，6家公司被要求作出解释。 警方在巴吞他尼府一处油库查获，截至3月25日，共有6家公司在库内存有“可立即出货”的柴油库存，总量高达2940万升，其中两家自有炼油厂的公司库存均超过1100万升。而就在3月26日，泰国政府宣布油价每升上涨6泰铢。警方发现，该油库在涨价前后的用电量出现异常波动，存在明显的“延迟放油、等待涨价”嫌疑。目前，内贸厅已正式发函，要求6家公司说明为何未及时向市场供油。 在对全国加油站供油情况进行排查后，警方发现三大异常：部分大型油库储油充足却放油量明显偏低；多艘运油船故意在海上延迟交货，涉及约790万升燃油；另有662趟油罐车运输未标注目的地，15趟偏离路线或关闭GPS，直接导致部分加油站断供。警方怀疑，这背后存在从油库、运输到销售环节的有组织囤油行为。 4月8日，警方对孔敬、罗勇、龙仔厝、巴吞他尼四府油库展开突击检查，查获多起典型违规案例。孔敬府一家分销商提油后不按规定入库，而是“车对车倒油”转移储存；罗勇府一家企业已注销经营资质，却仍储存超20万升燃油并继续售油；龙仔厝府则有人私自设立加油站、把LNG储罐改作柴油罐、允许客户现场加油收费。上述企业均已被当地能源办提起指控。 警方表示，已对全国6家

title: 近500万人涌入！2026曼谷宋干节人数翻倍暴增
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月16日，曼谷市政府发言人阿瓦伦透露，官方已公布2026年曼谷宋干节（4月10日至15日）整体活动统计数据，并与2025年同期进行对比，旨在总结本年度宋干节期间的整体运行情况及安全管理成效。具体内容如下： 一、参与人数（接近翻倍增长） 2026年曼谷宋干节整体氛围十分火热，全市94个活动场地累计吸引参与人数达4,958,965人次，相比2025年同期的2,564,663人次，增加了2,394,302人次，同比大幅增长93.4%。 累计参与人数排名前三的活动地点依次为： 第一名：暹罗广场——1,535,638人 第二名：暹罗天地——1,471,162人 第三名：是隆路——652,974人 二、道路交通事故统计（死亡人数上升） 根据Erawan中心及曼谷交通运输局在4月10日至15日期间的统计数据，2026年共发生致命交通事故18起，与2025年持平；累计死亡20人，较去年增加1人（2025年为19人）；累计受伤2,554人。 其中，造成死亡人数最多的交通工具为摩托车，共导致17人死亡，占总死亡人数的85%；在这17人中，有9人未佩戴头盔。 死亡人数最多的辖区为： Thung Khru区：3人 Prawet区：2人 三、活动区域垃圾量 4月11日至15日，重点活动区域累计产生垃圾达336吨，较2025年的250.5吨明显增加。 垃圾量最高的区域依次为： 考山路——1

title: What does it cost to raise a family in Thailand?
desc: What does it cost to raise a family in Thailand? Legacy Thailand regularly ranks among the top destinations for expat families, but cost estimates online tend to assume you are moving as a single person or a couple. Add children, and the numbers change considerably. Thailand international schools, healthcare in Thailand for expats , family housing, and dependent visas all carry costs that tend to get underestimated until you are already here. Here is what expat families are actually spending in Thailand in 2026. School options As of April 2026, there are 248 international schools in Thailand,

title: Songkran finished but Pattaya is still going — Here is the full Wan Lai 2026 schedule
desc: Songkran finished but Pattaya is still going — Here is the full Wan Lai 2026 schedule Legacy Songkran in Pattaya runs longer than anywhere else in Thailand, and that is not an accident. The local tradition known as Wan Lai extends the water festival well beyond the national three-day holiday, with different districts rotating their celebrations across the entire month of April. If you missed the main Songkran dates or simply want more, Pattaya is where you should come to. The Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) Pattaya Office has compiled the full schedule of Songkran events across Chonburi fo

title: Chinese woman stages her own kidnapping to extort money from father
desc: Chinese woman stages her own kidnapping to extort money from father Legacy Thai police arrested four Chinese nationals in Samut Prakan after a Chinese woman staged her own kidnapping with her boyfriend and two other men to extort money from her father . The case came to light after the woman’s father filed a complaint with police in China, saying his daughter, identified only as Tong, was kidnapped in Cambodia. He was told she had been tortured and that the gang demanded 110,000 yuan, about 550,000 baht, for her release. After the father transferred the money, Tong was still being held. The ga

title: 外国游客吐槽“泰国是个骗局”，反转结局让泰国网友笑疯
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 近日，一段标题为“Thailand is a scam（泰国是个骗局）”的视频在社交平台上意外爆红，迅速引发全球网友关注。初看标题，不少泰国网友以为又有人在批评泰国，甚至准备“开怼”，然而当大家耐心看完完整视频后，纷纷从疑惑转为笑容，直呼“这反转太妙了”。 视频中，一位外国游客用轻松幽默的语气解释道：他之所以说“泰国是个骗局”，并不是因为遭遇了欺诈，而是因为泰国给了他人生中从未体验过的极致快乐——在这里，他忘记了工作、生活、人际中的所有烦恼，沉浸在低廉却高质量的生活成本、热情友善的本地民众、以及令人上瘾的泰国美食之中。 他特别强调，泰国“最骗人”的地方在于：当你结束旅程回国后，会陷入一种前所未有的失落与忧郁。你根本无法从泰国的轻松氛围中走出来，脑海里反复闪现的是街头小贩的笑容、海边的日落、夜市里的烟火气。他说：“这种戒断反应，来泰国之前从没有人提醒过我。” 这段视频发布后，迅速在评论区引发全球游客的强烈共鸣。许多人留言表示：“我回国半年了，还是每天都在幻想回泰国。”“泰国不是骗局，是陷阱，一个让人心甘情愿跳进去的温柔陷阱。”还有人认真写道：“我已经开始学泰语了，计划未来搬到泰国长期生活。” 除了氛围和人情，泰国美食也成为讨论的焦点。众多网友在评论中点名泰式打抛饭、泰式炒河粉、芒果糯米饭和冬阴功汤，称这些是泰国“最强的软实力”之一。正是这些令人念念不忘的味道，让他们

title: 泰国商业部拟调整架构应对能源与成本上行压力
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，4月16日，泰国副总理兼商业部部长素帕琪表示，将加快对商业部工作架构进行大幅调整，以应对正在冲击泰国经济的双重危机。她称，当前泰国既面临国内经济复苏缓慢，也承受着中东地缘政治危机带来的外部压力，导致能源价格与商品成本上升。 她在祭拜商业部内的神圣象征后表示，此次重返岗位面临的挑战较以往更大，因为泰国正同时承受多重压力，如经济增长未充分发挥潜力，全球能源价格走高已开始影响民众生活成本。为应对上述局势，商业部拟在内部调整，重点将加强国内贸易司能力，以更有力地监管民生消费品价格并减轻对民众的影响。同时，商业部将引入更多领域专家参与关键议题的政策制定，涉及宏观经济、国际贸易与主要出口市场，包括中国、东盟、美国与欧洲。 她还表示，将推动一体化工作模式，与相关政府部门、私营部门及农业部门加强协同，制定更有效的应对方案，覆盖商品价格、生产与出口等问题，提高整体处置效率。 素帕琪表示，尽管形势严峻，但她会将其视为推动力，必须加紧工作以稳定经济、照顾民生。政府理解民众对生活成本上升的担忧，这些因素部分并非可控，政府将全力出台保障措施。 她指出，商业部重点关注的议题之一是化学肥料价格。相关领域已开始受到进口成本上升影响。目前国内化肥供应仍可维持至5月中旬，但来自马来西亚与文莱的新批次化肥成本上升不可避免；同时，从中东进口化肥仍受运输路线问题影响。因此，政府需要加快寻找替代

title: Japan pledges US$10 billion to tackle energy crisis in Asia
desc: Japan pledges US$10 billion to tackle energy crisis in Asia Legacy Japan pledged US$10 billion , or around 300 billion baht, to support Asian countries in addressing the energy crisis , citing the close links and interdependence created by supply chains. After a meeting with leaders from Asian countries, Japanese Prime Minister Takaichi Sanae announced that the funding would be directed to countries in Asia, particularly in Southeast Asia, to help secure crude oil and petroleum products, maintain supply chains and expand reserves. Sanae said Japan depended on Southeast Asian countries for petr

title: 宋干节期间156起交通事故 泰方严控返程客运零酒精
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，4月16日，泰国防灾减灾厅（DDPM）道路安全指挥中心通报宋干节期间道路事故统计。4月15日当天数据显示，道路交通事故156起，造成161人受伤，23人死亡。 通报称，在为期6天的道路安全宣传行动（2026年4月10日至15日）期间，累计发生事故1108起，累计受伤1073人，累计死亡216人。道路安全指挥中心表示，将统筹应对返程人流，强化客运车辆与驾驶员安全管理，要求驾驶员酒精含量必须为零，并将通过社区检查站对高风险青少年群体进行拦截筛查，同时加强对夏季风暴、火灾和PM2.5粉尘的监测预警。 泰国内政部副部长、宋干节道路事故防控指挥中心发布会主席杰赛表示，4月15日为“安全驾驶、降速减事故”宣传行动第6天。当天事故主要原因中，超速占43.59%，酒后驾驶占25.64%。事故涉及车辆类型以摩托车最多，占67.84%。事故多发生在直线路段，占89.74%；发生在公路局道路占46.79%。事故高发时段为18时01分至21时00分，占17.95%。伤亡人数最多的年龄段为20至29岁，占24.46%。 按地区统计，4月15日事故最多的府为清莱府，为10起；受伤人数最多的府为清莱府，为11人；死亡人数最多的府同为清莱府，为3人。 通报并指出，6天累计数据中，事故累计最多的府为帕府，为47起；累计受伤最多的府为帕府，为49人；累计死亡最多的地区为曼谷，为19人。

title: 4 Pattaya taxi riders and bar guards arrested for attacking 2 foreigners
desc: 4 Pattaya taxi riders and bar guards arrested for attacking 2 foreigners Legacy Four Thai men, including motorcycle taxi riders and bar security guards , were arrested after a viral video showed them attacking two foreigners during Songkran celebrations in Pattaya . The video was shared by the SiamChon News Facebook page on April 13 with a caption claiming that Pattaya motorcycle taxi riders attacked a foreign tourist in Soi Pattaya 6 after he sprayed water at them. In the footage, four to five Thai men are seen attacking a foreign man in a white shirt in the middle of the alley. Three of the

title: House sales to fall as war hits demand
desc: The residential market is expected to contract for a fourth consecutive year in 2026, with nationwide transfers projected to fall by 5.1% year-on-year to around 300,000 units, the lowest level in years, reflecting fragile buying activity, according to Kasikorn Research Center.

title: 自导自演绑架案！4名中国公民在泰被捕
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 一起引发中泰警方高度关注的“跨国绑架案”近日真相大白。一名19岁中国女子的父亲在支付逾11万元人民币赎金后，女儿仍未获释，遂向中国警方报案。泰国中央调查局接获中方协查请求后展开跨境调查，最终在北榄府一处出租屋内找到该女子，并逮捕4名中国籍涉案人员。令人震惊的是，这起所谓的绑架勒索案，竟是受害人自导自演、伙同他人共同欺骗其父亲的骗局。 案件随后在中国国内引发广泛关注。泰国中央调查局接获中方协查请求后立即展开调查。警方通过追踪视频拍摄地点、酒店入住记录及交通轨迹发现，涉案视频疑于曼谷辉煌区拍摄，并确认童某曾于3月28日至4月2日期间与多名中国籍人员入住当地酒店。 进一步调查显示，上述人员随后包车前往北榄府Bang Phli县Bang Kaeo分区一处村落出租屋。警方抵达现场核查后发现，屋内共居住6名中国籍人员（4男2女）。在取得北榄府法院搜查令后，警方进入屋内检查，并成功找到童某。 现场共有4名中国籍人员无法出示合法身份证件或护照，分别为： 29岁中国男子于某，系中国江苏南京警方以网络诈骗罪通缉人员，并被指为视频中对童某实施“虐待”的涉案人员之一； 19岁中国女子童某，即案件中所谓“被绑架”受害人； 26岁中国男子胡某； 26岁中国男子花某。 经调查，警方确认该案并非真实绑架，而是一起精心策划的“假绑架、真诈骗”案件。童某并未遭到绑架，而是与涉案人员共同拍摄“受虐”视

title: 2 Frenchmen arrested for assault on Thai motorcyclist in Phuket Songkran celebrations
desc: 2 Frenchmen arrested for assault on Thai motorcyclist in Phuket Songkran celebrations Legacy A Thai man suffered serious injuries after he was attacked by Frenchmen in Phuket on April 13 after refusing to join a Songkran water fight. The victim’s girlfriend, 27 year old Maytinee Sila, went to Patong Police Station on the day of the incident to report the assault on her 29 year old boyfriend, Kunanya Phokham. The incident took place at about 4pm in Soi Tan on Phra Metta Road in Kathu district, Phuket . Maytinee said Kunanya was riding a motorcycle to meet her at Black Bar near Marine Market whe

title: Thailand video news | Songkran road toll climbs as return travel raises fresh safety concerns, Patong police detain tourists accused of targeting officers with water guns
desc: Thailand video news | Songkran road toll climbs as return travel raises fresh safety concerns, Patong police detain tourists accused of targeting officers with water guns The Thaiger In Thailand video news, Alex and Jay cover stories from across Thailand and Southeast Asia. The headlines include both the highs and lows of Songkran. ASEAN leaders also respond to rising tensions in the Middle East. Meanwhile, air pollution continues to worsen in northern Thailand. Songkran Road Toll Climbs as Return Travel Raises Fresh Safety Concerns Thailand recorded 191 deaths and 911 injuries from 951 accide

title: Phichit man reports sexual assault by women and transwomen during Songkran
desc: Phichit man reports sexual assault by women and transwomen during Songkran Legacy A man filed a police complaint after a group of women and transwomen sexually assaulted him during Songkran celebrations in Phichit province, leaving a hickey on his neck . The victim, identified only as Chitsanupong, shared photos of marks on his neck on Facebook yesterday, April 15. Based on the tagged location in the post, the sexual assault took place at the Songkran Festival on Khao Tang Road. Chitsanupong said a group of three to four women and transwomen approached him and applied powder to him, as is comm

title: 5 things to do in Bangkok this weekend (April 17 to 19)
desc: 5 things to do in Bangkok this weekend (April 17 to 19) Legacy After the water fights , traffic, and noise of Songkran, Bangkok settles into a different rhythm this weekend. The holiday energy is not completely gone, but it is shifting into something easier, with free concerts, riverside live music, thoughtful exhibitions, and smaller creative events replacing the biggest splash zones. If you are ready to head out again after an electric week, these five events offer a gentler but still lively way to ease back into the city. On this page Event Date Location Highlight FWD Music Live Fest 5 Apri

title: “全球首发、中国首秀”！消博会将发布新品超200个
desc: 第六届中国国际消费品博览会从13日开始至18日在海南举办。本届消博会既是中国“十五五”开局之年的重大展会“首展”，也是海南自贸港全岛封关运作以后的“首秀”。本届消博会总展览面积比上届增加1.3万平方米；国际展品占比大幅提升至65%；超过200件新品将发布，被看作消费引领高水平开放的风向标。（来源：央视网） The post “全球首发、中国首秀”！消博会将发布新品超200个 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: Cat bites owner, stops Thai train, gets blamed for seven-hour delay
desc: Cat bites owner, stops Thai train, gets blamed for seven-hour delay Legacy A cat that attacked its owner and scratched fellow passengers on a southbound train has been blamed online for a seven-hour delay , though passengers say two successive engine failures were the real cause. Rapid Train No.169, travelling from Bangkok Aphiwat to Yala, arrived at Yala station at 6.15pm on Monday, 430 minutes behind schedule. A Facebook post by Kijja Pongpisan , shared widely by local media on April 14, described how the train halted mid-journey after a cat became agitated and bit its owner, drawing blood,

title: 第六届中国国际消费品博览会举办
desc: 4月13日，第六届中国国际消费品博览会在海南举办。本届展会是海南自贸港全岛封关运作后的首届国家级消费盛会，以“开放引领全球消费，创新驱动美好生活”为主题，汇聚了来自60多个国家和地区的超过3400个品牌参展，搭建起全球消费精品展示交易的国际化平台。（来源：新华网） 第六届中国国际消费品博览会暨2026“购在中国”国际消费季启动仪式现场 新华社记者 杨冠宇 摄 The post 第六届中国国际消费品博览会举办 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: 泰国2025年职场幸福感区域排名第三 倦怠与压力成关键挑战
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月16日，据泰媒报道，Jobsdb by SEEK作为泰国领先的在线求职平台，公布了2025年《职场幸福感报告》调查结果。该报告基于泰国境内超过1000名受访者，发现泰国职场人整体幸福感水平为67%。 在区域对比中，泰国排名第3，低于印度尼西亚（82%）与菲律宾（77%）。同时，新加坡（56%）与中国香港（47%）的幸福感水平更低。 不过，报告指出，尽管泰国整体幸福感数值处于较好水平，但报告也反映出工作单位不应忽视的关键挑战，尤其是“倦怠”与“累积压力”。这显示在提升并建立更可持续、更有效的职场幸福感上仍有较大空间。 Jobsdb by SEEK董事总经理都彭表示，Jobsdb by SEEK的报告清楚显示，工作中感到幸福的员工，投入并做出超出预期工作的倾向高达86%；而工作中不幸福的员工，该比例仅为54%。这一数据反映，工作幸福感是影响员工动机与推动组织运转的重要变量。 此外，幸福感高的员工向他人推荐组织的比例，比不幸福员工高出35%。这显示职场幸福感不仅有助于提升工作效率，也能通过员工本身成为强化组织形象的重要工具。同时，薪酬是吸引优秀人才加入的基础关键因素，但对工作成果价值的塑造、对工作被认可的感受，以及清晰的目标，同样是促使员工产生黏性并支持组织长期可持续成长的关键。 报告指出，现代职场幸福感的核心在于管理“员工重视的事项”与“员工在现实生活中实际获得的

title: 2026年宋干节盛况空前 多家国际媒体聚焦世界级泼水节
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月15日，据泰媒报道，泰国总理府办公室发言人拉差达表示，2026年宋干节整体活动呈现热烈、盛大氛围，展现了泰国宋干节作为联合国教科文组织登记的文化遗产所具备的国际影响力。她称，宋干节获得多国认可，并吸引全球民众参与，涵盖传统礼俗、文化活动与娱乐项目等多个层面。 她指出，今年共有42家驻泰外国大使馆参与合作，包括英国、瑞士、丹麦、德国、印度、比利时、中国、菲律宾、越南、澳大利亚和美国等，各大使馆共同制作宣传内容，以更现代、更易传播的方式呈现泰国文化特色，进一步触达全球受众。 同时，多家国际媒体机构，包括美联社、路透社、欧罗新闻和新华社，报道了多个重点区域的泼水活动氛围，尤其是考山路等地，游客十分密集。相关报道称，泰国宋干节是全球最盛大、最具色彩的节庆之一，体现了传统文化与当代生活方式的融合。北美媒体将宋干节描述为“世界级泼水节”，认为其对泰国经济与旅游业具有重要作用。 在安全管理方面，泰方称也获得外媒关注与肯定。例如《海峡时报》发布了“10条安全玩水规则”，包括禁止性骚扰、禁止未经同意抹粉、禁止使用高压水枪等，反映活动组织强调公众安全与秩序。 关于旅游市场总体表现，泰国国家旅游局评估称，宋干节期间（2026年4月11日至15日）预计将带来全国旅游总收入超过303.5亿泰铢，其中入境外国游客约500000人，预计创造收入约81亿泰铢。政府发言人并表示，政府将持续推动
